## Maintainer Task

Describe the smallest reviewable maintenance change.

## Triage

- Area: docs / tests / dependency / release / security / privacy / automation
- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Source evidence:

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The task has a clear owner and scope.
- [ ] Local validation commands are listed.
- [ ] Security and privacy impact is checked.
- [ ] Release note impact is recorded or marked not applicable.

## Safety Boundary

Do not include real credentials, private student data, uploaded evidence files,
generated reports, or provider secrets in this issue.
